name: pokemon_name
description: Pokemon name (h1 on each pokemondb.net page; PokéAPI's species name for Push source)

name: pokemon_type
description: Pokemon type(s) — multi-value because dual-type Pokemon exist (e.g., Grass/Poison)

name: image_url
description: URL of the Pokemon's main artwork (pokemondb sprite for Source A, PokéAPI official artwork for Source B)

name: dex_number
description: National Pokédex number — used for sorting in canonical order

name: base_hp
description: Base HP stat from PokéAPI (Source B only). 1-255 range.

name: base_attack
description: Base Attack stat from PokéAPI (Source B only). 1-255 range.

name: base_defense
description: Base Defense stat from PokéAPI (Source B only). 1-255 range.

name: base_sp_attack
description: Base Special Attack stat from PokéAPI (Source B only). 1-255 range.

name: base_sp_defense
description: Base Special Defense stat from PokéAPI (Source B only). 1-255 range.

name: base_speed
description: Base Speed stat from PokéAPI (Source B only). 1-255 range.

name: abilities
description: Pokemon abilities from PokéAPI (Source B only). Multi-value because most Pokemon have 2-3 abilities (e.g., Charizard: Blaze, Solar Power).

name: is_form_variant
description: True if this document is a form variant (Mega, Hisuian, Galarian, Alolan, Gigantamax, etc.) — Source B's whole point. False/absent on Source A docs.

name: base_species
description: Base species slug for form variants (e.g., 'charizard' for charizard-mega-x). Lets the Detail Page surface all forms of one species.
